# Program Proposal — Androgod(ess) Q3 2026 — 5-Day Mon–Fri (3× Glute Frequency)

**Date:** 2026-05-22 (rebuilt to v6 after user redirect)  
**Current routine:** `Androgod(ess) Q2 2026` (4-day Lower/Upper split) — UUID `4d31af5f-edf2-4bb6-b272-5d90959f919b`  
**Proposed routine:** `Androgod(ess) Q3 2026 — 5-Day (Mon–Fri, 3× Glute Stagger)`  
**Day count change:** 4 → 5 (Mon–Fri, weekends OFF — Fri is optional specialization, not equivalent if skipped)  
**Generated by:** `/program-review rewrite` skill — 3 critique iterations + 2 codex adversarial gates (v4 + v6)  
**Spec amendments (Lou-confirmed):** biceps DEFERRED → BUILD (width + peak); abs more direct rectus; chest 4–6 sets/wk shape work; exclusions unchanged.  
**Structural redirect by Lou:** v5 was Mon/Tue/Thu/Sat/Sun and stacked Sat→Sun→Mon→Tue. Rebuilt Mon–Fri only. 3× glute frequency staggered intensity (Lou's intuition, research-supported).

---

## 🚫 GATED — DO NOT RUN MIGRATION CALLS UNTIL all 3 are true:

1. **Lou explicitly says "apply"** in conversation, AND
2. **SMM holding or up** vs the 27.4 kg May 9 reading (next InBody ≥ 2026-05-23), AND
3. **HRV recovery state acceptable** AND **enough valid data to read it:**
   - `worse_of(delta_pct, window_avg_delta) ≥ −15%` (use both, the worse one drives)
   - **≥ 7 valid in-bed (Eight Sleep) nights in the last 10 calendar nights** (no travel substitute — see Eight Sleep note below)
   - 21–28 day HRV trend not sharply negative unless there's an explicit deload/recovery explanation

**Eight Sleep travel caveat:** Sleep + HRV come from the Eight Sleep mattress, not a watch. When Lou travels there is no data. The gate must NOT clear on sparse post-travel data because the first 5 home nights may be rebound sleep (artificially good readings). Require 7-of-last-10 valid nights AND the gate criteria.

Every MCP call below is prefixed `# GATED:` as runtime safety. A future session reading this file MUST re-confirm all 3 gates before executing.

---

## 1. Executive summary

The current 4-day program over-serves glutes/hamstrings (24–30 sets/wk), under-serves hip abductors (3–8 vs 12–14 target — directly blocks hip-width-illusion), and skips chest + biceps entirely. Mockup review wants biceps width+peak, more rectus, raloxifene-safe chest shape, shorter sessions.

v5's first attempt used Mon/Tue/Thu/Sat/Sun — broke at the week boundary (Sat→Sun→Mon→Tue = 4 in a row). v6 is **Mon–Fri only, weekends off**, with **3× glute frequency at staggered intensity** (heavy Mon / moderate Wed / light Fri — 48h between each). Same total glute volume distributed across 3 sessions = no per-session overload, less recovery debt.

Hip abductors, core, and biceps also move to 3× frequency (or near). Upper days (Tue push, Thu pull) bracket the lower days so quad/glute recovery isn't compromised. Per-muscle recovery research drives the day distribution (see embedded table).

**Will not migrate until SMM trajectory reverses AND HRV recovery state clears AND there's enough valid sleep data to actually read it.** Codex caught that v4 only gated on SMM and could apply into deep recovery debt. v6 adds the multi-night data-validity requirement on top.

---

Same as v5. Unchanged.

## 3. Per-muscle recovery research table (drives day distribution)

| Muscle | Heavy recovery | Moderate recovery | Max weekly freq | Source |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Glutes | 48–72h | 36–48h | 3–4×/wk | Schoenfeld 2016/2019; Contreras |
| Hamstrings | 48–72h | 48h | 2–3×/wk | Schoenfeld 2019 eccentric damage |
| Quads | 48–72h | 48h | 2–3×/wk | Schoenfeld 2019 |
| Hip abductors | 24–48h | 24–36h | 3–4×/wk | Helms; RP |
| Calves | 24h | 24h | 3–6×/wk tolerable | Schoenfeld 2016 |
| Chest | 48h | 36–48h | 2–3×/wk | Schoenfeld 2019 |
| Delts (lateral) | 24–48h | 24h | 3–4×/wk | Schoenfeld; Pedrosa 2022 lengthened-bias |
| Delts (rear) | 24–48h | 24h | 3×/wk | Schoenfeld |
| Lats | 48h | 36–48h | 2–3×/wk | Schoenfeld |
| Rhomboids / mid-traps | 24–48h | 24h | 2–3×/wk | Helms |
| Rotator cuff | 24h | 24h | **HARD CAP 8 sets/wk total** | Overuse-injury specific |
| Biceps | 24–48h | 24h | 2–3×/wk | Helms |
| Triceps | 48h | 24–36h | 2–3×/wk | Helms (press-pattern overlap) |
| Core (rectus) | 24–48h | 24h | 3–4×/wk | RP |
| Core (anti-rot) | 24h | 24h | Daily-tolerable | Stiffness training |
| Erectors | 48–72h | 48h | 2×/wk | Deadlift-pattern recovery |
| Forearms | 24h | 24h | Daily-tolerable | Grip work, rarely limiter |

**HRT context:** Estradiol's effect on recovery is net POSITIVE (reduced exercise-induced damage, increased satellite cell activity, anti-inflammatory). HRT does NOT lengthen recovery times. It DOES cap absolute MPS capacity → lower total weekly volume ceiling (14–18 for build muscles, 8–12 for maintain). Frequency is unaffected.

**Day-distribution rules derived from table:**
1. Heavy lower → 48h → moderate lower → 48h → light lower. M heavy / W mod / F light = 48/48/48.
2. Upper days bracket lower days (Tue between M-heavy & W-mod; Thu between W-mod & F-light).
3. Erectors hit only 2×/wk (M RDL + W back ext); F has no direct erector work.
4. Rotator cuff hard cap 8 sets/wk including all secondary credit.
5. Core rectus 2–3× freq at varying loads.

---

## 4. Current vs proposed — at a glance

| Aspect | Current (Q2 4-day) | Proposed (Q3 5-day Mon-Fri) |
|---|---|---|
| Sessions/wk | 4 | 5 (D5 optional specialization, see §7) |
| Schedule | Lower/Upper varying days | M heavy lower / T push / W mod lower / Th pull / F light + specialty |
| Avg session | 70–75 min (max 92) | 60 min target (D1 64 / D3 60-65 honest with rest math / D5 60-65) |
| Off days | 3 | 2 (Sat, Sun) |
| Glute freq | 2× | **3× staggered (H/M/L)** |
| Hip abductor freq | 1–2× | **3×** |
| Core freq | 2× | **2× rectus + 1× anti-rot + 1× hedge set** |
| Biceps freq | 1–2× | **3× (T finisher + Th primary + F peak)** |
| Delts (lateral) freq | 2× | 2× (T + F) — could be 3× by adding to Th if needed |
| Glute sets/wk | 24–30 | 14 prim + ~5 sec ≈ 19 (with D5) / 12 prim + ~4 sec ≈ 16 (without D5) |
| Hip abductor sets/wk | 3–8 | 10 prim + ~2 stab ≈ 12 (with D5) / 8 prim + ~2 stab ≈ 10 (without) |
| Hamstring sets/wk | 18–30 | 6 prim + ~3 sec ≈ 9 |
| Biceps sets/wk | 7–12 | 13 direct + ~2 sec ≈ 15 (with D5) / 10 + 2 sec ≈ 12 (without) |
| Chest sets/wk | 0 | 5 |
| Triceps sets/wk | 0–8 | 6.5 |
| Rotator cuff sets/wk | 9–20 (chronic over) | ~5 (10 labeled secondary, ~half-credit) |
| Deload | None | W1 65% / W2 80% / W3 95% / W4 65% RIR 3–4 |

## 5. Per-muscle weekly volume targets

| Slug | Wk(-3..0) range | New target | With D5 | Without D5 | Status |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| glutes | 20–30 | 16–20 | ≈19 | ≈16 | ✓ both within |
| hip_abductors | 3–8 | 12–14 | ≈12 | ≈10 | ✓ with D5, at floor without |
| core (rectus direct) | ~3 | 10–14 | 10 | 4 | ✓ with D5, **under without** |
| core (anti-rot) | ~10 | 4–6 | 3 | 3 | ✓ |
| biceps (direct) | 7–12 | 13–16 | 13 | 10 | ✓ with D5, **under without** |
| delts (lateral-direct) | ~8 | 8–10 | 8 | 5 | ✓ with D5, **under without** |
| delts (total) | 14–30 | 14–16 | ≈13 | ≈10 | near with D5, under without |
| chest | 0 | 4–6 | 5 | 5 | ✓ |
| triceps | 0–8 | 8–10 | 6.5 | same | under (1× freq accepted) |
| hamstrings | 18–30 | 10–12 | 9 | same | slightly under |
| lats | 4–10 | 8–10 | 6 | same | under (1× freq) |
| rhomboids / mid_traps | 3–7 / 0–4 | 8–10 / 6–8 | 7 / 4 | same | rhomboids near, mid_traps under |
| rotator_cuff | 9–20 | ≤8 | ~5 effective (10 labeled sec) | ~3 | ✓ under cap |
| calves | 0–3 | 6 | 2 | 2 | under (deprioritized — see gaps) |
| quads | 5–9 | incidental | ~1.5 sec | same | intentional anti-quad |
| erectors | 3 | 4–6 | ~4 | same | at floor |

**Critical: D5 (Fri) is NOT skippable-equivalent.** Codex caught v6's earlier "without D5 within target" claim was too generous. Skipping Fri converts the program to effectively 4-day with under-target lateral delts, biceps, hip abductors, and core. D5 is protective on bad-recovery weeks but accept the trade.

---

## 6. Schedule + cutover ramp

| Day | When | Routine | Glute intensity | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| D1 | Mon | Lower A — Glute Heavy + Hams | **HEAVY** | Freshest day → power work |
| D2 | Tue | Upper Push (Chest + Delts + Triceps + 1 bicep finisher) | — | 24h after D1: only upper, lower can recover |
| D3 | Wed | Lower B — Glute MODERATE + Hip Abd + Core | **MODERATE** | 48h after D1 heavy ✓ |
| D4 | Thu | Upper Pull (Back + Biceps Width + Long-head) | — | 24h after D3: only upper |
| D5 | Fri | Lower C / Specialty (Glute Light + Lateral Spec + Bicep Peak + Abs) | **LIGHT** | 48h after D3 ✓. **Optional specialization** (5 skip triggers below) |
| — | Sat | OFF | — | 72h before next Monday heavy |
| — | Sun | OFF | — | 24h before next Monday |

**Week boundary now = 72h gap between Friday-evening session and Monday-morning heavy.** No more cross-week stacking.

### Cutover 4-week cycle

| Week | Volume | RIR floor |
|---|---|---|
| W1 | 65% | 3 |
| W2 | 80% | 2 |
| W3 | 95% | 1–2 |
| W4 | 65% deload | 3–4 |

**Return-to-W1 gate (after each W4 deload):** HRV window_avg within 10% of baseline (when valid data exists) + sleep consistency ≥40 (when not traveling) + subjective mood/joint ≥6/10. If 2+ red, extend deload by 1 week.

**Session-time cap:** 5 min warm-up + 55 min work = 60 min target. Honest estimates:
- D1 Mon: 64 min (HT 120s rest dominates)
- D2 Tue: 62 min
- D3 Wed: **60–65 min** (BSS 90s/side rest = ~9 min just BSS)
- D4 Thu: 60 min
- D5 Fri: **60–65 min** (lying lateral 90s/side = ~9 min just lateral)

### D5 skip rule (any ONE triggers a skip)

- HRV ≥10% below baseline that morning (when valid data exists)
- <6h asleep
- DOMS ≥6/10 in lower-body from D3 OR biceps/elbow/grip from D4
- Any joint pinch (knee/shoulder/lower back)
- Subjective "flat" rating ≤4/10

**Skip-week reality (honest):** dropping D5 takes lateral delts → 5, rectus → 4, biceps → 10, hip_abd → 10. Lou is choosing protection over hitting all targets for that week. Don't pretend it's equivalent.

### Missed-session rule

- D1/D2 missed → run next available day, shift downstream by one (cap week at 5)
- D3/D4 missed → drop D5 first
- **Never train two lower days within 48h**

### Nutrition cues (unchanged from v5)

- **Pre-D1, D3, D5** (60–90 min): 30–40g carb + 15–20g whey (banana + scoop, or ½ Farmers Union HP + scoop)
- **Post-lift** (within 60 min, all training days): 25–40g protein
- **Post-dinner Farmers Union HP 200g** snack: load-bearing for overnight MPS on training days

### HRT-timing note

Estrogel applied AM → E2 peaks early-to-mid afternoon. Lou trains 19:00–21:00 = E2 descending tail. Flag for awareness; don't restructure unless work schedule allows earlier sessions.

---

## 7. Day-by-day structure

### Day 1 — Lower A: Glute HEAVY + Hams (Mon) — 18 sets, ~64 min

**Warm-up (5 min):** 3 min bike or row, 2 min banded glute bridge activation (2×15) + 1×10 air squat.

| # | Exercise | Sets × Reps | Window | Primary | Secondary | RIR | Rest | Tempo / cues |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | Hip Thrust (Barbell) — 2 ramp sets (empty bar ×10, 50% ×5) | 4 × 6–8 | power | glutes | hamstrings | 1–2 | 120s | **HEAVY glute session.** 1s pause top, controlled descent. Chin tucked, drive ribs DOWN at top (posterior pelvic tilt). Common mistake: hyperextending lumbar — shifts load to erectors. |
| 2 | Romanian Deadlift (Barbell + straps) — 1 ramp @ 60% ×6 | 3 × 8–10 | build | hamstrings | glutes, erectors | 1–2 | 120s | **3s eccentric**, no pause at bottom, explosive concentric. |
| 3 | Leg Curl (Lying) | 3 × 10–12 | build | hamstrings | — | 1–2 | 90s | — |
| 4 | Cable Hip Abduction | 3 × 12–15 | pump | hip_abductors | glutes | 1 | 60s | Toes turned out 15°, torso vertical. Frontal plane only — TFL guard. |
| 5 | Cable Crunch (weighted, kneeling) | 3 × 10–12 | build | core | — | 1–2 | 60s | — |
| 6 | Calf Raise (Standing Machine) | 2 × 10–15 | pump | calves | — | 1 | 60s | Last set: double-drop ~30%/30%. |

---

### Day 2 — Upper Push (Tue) — 19 sets, ~63 min

**Warm-up (5 min):** 3 min bike, 2 min band pull-apart + cuff external rotation.

| # | Exercise | Sets × Reps | Window | Primary | Secondary | RIR | Rest | Tempo / cues |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | Incline DB Press (30°) — 1 ramp @ 50% ×6 | 3 × 8–12 | build | chest | delts, triceps | 1–2 | 90s | Press to a point above the eyes. Biases clavicular fibers = upper-chest fullness. |
| 2 | Cable Lateral Raise (ipsilateral, behind body, bottom-bias) — reuse UUID `121fc414…` | 5 × 12–15 | pump | delts | rotator_cuff | 2 | 90s | Working shoulder *away* from stack; cable crosses behind hip; arm starts across opposite thigh; raise laterally. Hardest at bottom 30°. |
| 3 | Rear Delt Fly (Bentover DB) | 3 × 12–15 | pump | delts | rhomboids | 1 | 60s | — |
| 4 | Overhead Cable Triceps Extension | 3 × 10–12 | build | triceps | — | 1–2 | 75s | — |
| 5 | Cable Flye (**low-to-high**) | 2 × 12–15 | pump | chest | delts | 1 | 60s | Hands meet up + slightly in front, mirrors incline press path. |
| 6 | Cable Triceps Pushdown | 2 × 12–15 | pump | triceps | — | 1 | 60s | Last set: rest-pause (8 → 15s → AMRAP). |
| 7 | Incline DB Curl — **1 finisher set** | 1 × 10–12 | build | biceps | — | 1–2 | — | Makes biceps 3× freq across the week (T + Th + F). Skip-week-D5 still leaves 2× freq + 10 direct. |

---

### Day 3 — Lower B: Glute MODERATE + Hip Abd + Core (Wed) — 14 sets, ~60 min

**Warm-up (5 min):** 3 min bike, 2 min banded clamshell (2×15 each) + bodyweight glute bridge.

**Codex fix from v6 draft:** trimmed back ext 3→2, BSS 3→2, RIR floor 2–3. This is now genuinely *moderate* — recovery-respecting middle session of the 3× glute stagger, not a second heavy session.

| # | Exercise | Sets × Reps | Window | Primary | Secondary | RIR | Rest | Tempo / cues |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | Hip Thrust (Banded Pulse, lighter than Mon) | 2 × 10–15 | pump | glutes | — | 2–3 | 75s | **MODERATE glute session.** Sub-maximal load, re-prime the pattern. |
| 2 | 45° Back Extension (glute-bias) — reuse UUID `9dbef625…` | 2 × 10–12 | build | glutes | hamstrings, erectors | 2–3 | 90s | **Rounded upper back + posterior pelvic tilt at top. Squeeze glutes, not erectors. If you feel hams/lower back, re-cue.** W2 sweep calibration check: "did this feel glute-dominant?" |
| 3 | Bulgarian Split Squat (DB) — 1 ramp/leg | 2 × 8–12 | build | glutes | quads, hamstrings, hip_abductors | 2 | 90s/side | 2s descent, 1s pause at stretch, explosive concentric. |
| 4 | Cable Hip Abduction | 3 × 12–15 | pump | hip_abductors | glutes | 1 | 60s | Same cues as D1. |
| 5 | Banded Clamshell (side-lying glute med) | 2 × 15 each | pump | hip_abductors | glutes | 1 | 45s | — |
| 6 | Pallof PRESS (anti-rotation) | 3 × 10–12 each side | build | core | — | 2–3 | 75s | Stiffness drill, NOT failure work. |

D3 totals: glutes **6 prim** + ~3 sec, hip_abd 5 prim + 2 stab, core 3 (functional), hams ~2 sec, erectors ~1.5 sec. **Moderate, not heavy.**

---

### Day 4 — Upper Pull (Thu) — 17 sets, ~60 min

**Warm-up (5 min):** 3 min row machine (primes lats), 2 min band pull-apart + light banded curl.

| # | Exercise | Sets × Reps | Window | Primary | Secondary | RIR | Rest | Tempo / cues |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | Lat Pulldown (Wide Overhand) | 3 × 8–12 | build | lats | rhomboids, biceps | 1–2 | 90s | — |
| 2 | Chest-Supported Row (machine or T-bar) | 3 × 8–12 | build | rhomboids, mid_traps | lats, biceps | 1–2 | 90s | Back work BEFORE direct curls. |
| 3 | Wide-Grip EZ-Bar Curl | 4 × 10–12 | build | biceps | — | 1–2 | 75s | Short-head dominant (wider grip biases inner head = width). |
| 4 | Cable Rope Hammer Curl | 3 × 10–12 | build | biceps | forearms | 1–2 | 60s | Neutral grip start-to-finish. Brachialis = arm width. |
| 5 | Incline DB Curl (60° back, long-head bias) | 2 × 8–10 | build | biceps | — | 1–2 | 75s | Long-head insurance. |
| 6 | Face Pulls | 2 × 12–15 | pump | delts | rhomboids, mid_traps, rotator_cuff | 1 | 60s | — |

---

### Day 5 — Lower C / Specialty: Glute LIGHT + Lateral Spec + Bicep Peak + Abs (Fri) — 16 sets, ~60–65 min — OPTIONAL SPECIALIZATION

**Warm-up (5 min):** 3 min light cardio, 2 min band pull-apart + cuff ER + banded clamshell.

| # | Exercise | Sets × Reps | Window | Primary | Secondary | RIR | Rest | Tempo / cues |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | Cable Pull-Through (light glute) | 2 × 12–15 | pump | glutes | hamstrings | 2 | 60s | **LIGHT glute session.** Hinge-dominant, hips back, glutes drive lockout. (Lou previously flagged Pull-Through as first-cut for poor MMC — give it one more cued attempt; alternative: light banded HT pulse 2×15.) |
| 2 | Cable Hip Abduction OR Standing Glute Med Side Raise | 2 × 15 | pump | hip_abductors | glutes | 1 | 45s | 3rd hip_abd exposure this week. |
| 3 | Lying Incline DB Lateral Raise (single-arm, side-lying on 30° bench) | 3 × 10–12 | build | delts | rotator_cuff | 2 | 90s/side | **STRETCH-bias lateral.** Deep stretch at bottom (arm hangs across body). Different stimulus pattern from D2 cable lateral. 2s lower. |
| 4 | Cable Crunch (weighted, kneeling) | 3 × 10–12 | build | core | — | 1–2 | 60s | — |
| 5 | Reverse Crunch (supine) | 3 × 10–15 | build | core | — | 1–2 | 60s | **Keep lumbar flat against pad, stop at hips-perpendicular, don't chase ROM** (SI joint). NO rest-pause. |
| 6 | Incline DB Curl (long-head, 60° back) | 3 × 8–10 | build | biceps | — | 1–2 | 75s | Same exercise as D4 slot 5. **Bicep PEAK day.** |

---

## 8. Frequency check (honest)

| Slug | Sessions hit | Freq | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| glutes | M heavy, W mod, F light | **3×** | Staggered intensity — the v6 thesis |
| hip_abductors | M, W (×2 exercises), F | **3×** | Was 1–2× current |
| core (rectus) | M, F (×2 exercises) | 2× direct | W gets 0 rectus, only Pallof anti-rot |
| core (anti-rot) | W | 1× | Stiffness, not hypertrophy |
| biceps | T finisher 1, Th primary 9, F peak 3 | **3× freq, 13 direct** | Honest 3× via T finisher |
| delts (lateral-direct) | T (5), F (3) | 2× | Could go 3× by adding to Th — held to honor cap |
| delts (rear) | T (3), Th face pulls (2 sec) | 2× | |
| chest | T | 1× | Intentional (raloxifene-safe) |
| triceps | T | 1× | Under target, accepted |
| lats | Th | 1× | |
| hamstrings | M (heavy), Th sec, F sec | ~1.5× | |
| erectors | M (RDL), W (back ext) | 2× | Cap respected |

## 9. Migration plan (LOCKED ORDER — only after 3-gate clears)

Same MCP call sequence as v5 was — substitutions for v6:
- Routine title: `Androgod(ess) Q3 2026 — 5-Day (Mon–Fri, 3× Glute Stagger)`
- Day count: 5 (D1 Mon, D2 Tue, D3 Wed, D4 Thu, D5 Fri)
- D3 trimmed (back ext 2, BSS 2)
- D5 location = Friday, not Sunday

### Pre-migration

**Step 1 — SKILL.md edits (BEFORE Rebirth writes):**
- Move biceps from "Deferred" → "What we ARE building" with WIDTH + PEAK narrative
- Add chest subsection under "Maintained (capped)" with ≤6 set/wk cap + raloxifene rationale
- Update calorie target line 2,050 → 2,250 (May 9 course correction)
- Update "Open watch-points (May 2026)" — REPLACE stale bullets with v6 numbers

### Rebirth writes (all `# GATED:`)

**Step 2 — Vision update:**
```
# GATED: update_vision({
#   uuid: "vision-androgodess-001",
#   build_emphasis: ["delts","glutes","hip_abductors","core","biceps"],
#   maintain_emphasis: ["chest"],
#   deemphasize: ["traps"],
#   body_md: <literal template below>
# })
```

Literal body_md template:
```
## Androgod(ess) — feminine athletic silhouette
[keep current opening 2 paragraphs unchanged]

### Priority muscles (canonical slugs)
- **Delts → shoulder caps.** [unchanged]
- **Glutes → glute shelf and projection.** [unchanged]
- **Hip abductors → lateral glute / hip width illusion.** [unchanged]
- **Core (rectus + functional) → midsection definition + heavy-lift safety.** [unchanged]
- **Biceps → arm WIDTH and PEAK (promoted 2026-05-22).** Width = short head + brachialis (wide-grip EZ curl, preacher, cable rope hammer). Peak = long head (incline DB curl). Target 14–16 sets/wk direct.

### Maintained (capped, not chased for mass)
- **Back work (lats, rhomboids, mid-traps)** [unchanged]
- **Chest (shape-only, ≤6 sets/wk, added 2026-05-22).** Incline DB press + cable flye (low-to-high) only. Raloxifene-safe. NO flat barbell bench, decline, dips.

### Deferred
- (empty — biceps promoted 2026-05-22)

### Explicit non-goals
- [unchanged]

### Pacing
[unchanged]
```

**Step 3 — Plan update:**
```
# GATED: update_plan({
#   uuid: "plan-androgodess-2026q2-001",
#   programming_dose: {
#     ...,
#     strength_sessions_per_week: {
#       min: 4,
#       max: 5,
#       rationale: "5-day Mon-Fri split, weekends OFF. 3× glute frequency staggered (heavy/mod/light). D5 (Fri) is optional specialization — skipping converts to 4-day with under-target lateral delts/biceps/core. Floor 4 honored even on D5-skip weeks."
#     }
#   }
# })
```

**Step 4 — Exercise catalog:**
- `find_exercises` first for UUID reuse: `Lateral Raise: Cable (Standing)` (`121fc414…`), `Hyperextension: 45° Glute Bias` (`9dbef625…`), Triceps Pushdown variants.
- `create_exercise` only for: Overhead Cable Triceps Extension, Cable Flye (low-to-high), Wide-Grip EZ-Bar Curl, Cable Rope Hammer Curl, Incline DB Curl (60° back), Cable Crunch (weighted kneeling), Reverse Crunch, Banded Clamshell, Chest-Supported Row, Lying Incline DB Lateral Raise.
- Form-cue strings go into `set_targets.note` per exercise.

**Step 5 — Routine update:**
```
# GATED: update_routine({ uuid: "4d31af5f-…", title: "Androgod(ess) Q3 2026 — 5-Day (Mon–Fri, 3× Glute Stagger)" })
# GATED: per-day exercise list via add_exercise / swap_exercise / remove_exercise
# GATED: create_routine for D5 (Fri Specialty) linked to same plan
# GATED: update_set_targets per exercise — sets, rep windows, RIR, rest, notes
```

### Post-migration

**Step 6 — SKILL.md routine-name update.**

**Step 7 — Plan checkpoint (READ-then-CONCAT, preserve May 9 notes):**
```
# GATED: existing = get_active_plan().checkpoints[chkpt-androgodess-2026q2-001].notes
# GATED: log_plan_checkpoint({
#   uuid: "chkpt-androgodess-2026q2-001",
#   notes: existing + "\n\n## YYYY-MM-DD — program shift (5-day Mon-Fri v6)\n[full change list]",
#   adjustments_made: "Program shift to 5-day Mon-Fri split + 3× glute frequency staggered. Spec amendments: biceps BUILD (width + peak), chest MAINTAIN (4-6 sets shape-only). Deload cycle (W1 65/W2 80/W3 95/W4 65% RIR 3-4). Plan dose updated to 5 sessions/wk max (D5 optional specialization). Apply gate required: SMM holding + HRV recovery + ≥7 valid Eight Sleep nights in last 10.",
#   review_date: <YYYY-MM-DD>
# })
```

**Step 8 — Coaching log updates:**
```
# GATED: update_coaching_note(monitoring log uuid="5c8c86a6-...") — append "### YYYY-MM-DD — course correction (5-day Mon-Fri v6 applied)"
# GATED: update_coaching_note(monitoring protocol uuid="5caa5cb6-...") — UPDATE flag triggers:
#   - glute range 16-20 (replace 14-24)
#   - rotator cap ≤8 (replace 2-8; honest cap)
#   - lateral-direct target 8-10 (new)
#   - D5-skip-streak trigger (≥3 weeks running = recovery debt sign)
#   - biceps e1RM baseline-by-W4 watch-point
```

---

## 10. Watch-points post-cutover

| Watch-point | Trigger | Action |
|---|---|---|
| Glute volume creep | sets ≥21 for 2+ weeks | Trim a glute-primary set from D3 |
| Hip abductor floor | sets <10 for 2+ weeks | Add 1 set clamshell or cable abd |
| Rotator cuff cap | effective sets >8 for any week | Pull back D2 lateral or D5 sets |
| Lateral delt direct | <8 for 2+ weeks | Add 1 set; if >12 sustained, trim |
| SMM trajectory | ↓ at next InBody | Drop chest + bicep additions; revert to 4-day |
| HRV red 2+ weeks | window_avg <−10% sustained | Trigger immediate deload regardless of week-in-cycle |
| D5 skip streak | skipped 3+ weeks running | Recovery debt signal — review HRV/sleep before next cycle |
| W3 → W1 jump too aggressive | HRV drops sharply at W3 | The staggered intensity isn't actually staggered — Wed may be running too close to Mon heavy. Recalibrate. |
| Trap visual creep | week 6 mirror check shows trap bulk | Drop face pulls; substitute straight-arm pulldown |
| Biceps e1RM baseline | establish by W4 | New lifts (EZ curl, rope hammer, incl curl) need baselines |
| 45° Back Ext calibration | W2 sweep — "glutes or hams?" | If hams, re-cue (rounded back, posterior pelvic tilt) |
| Eight Sleep travel gap | ≥3 consecutive nights missing | Note in sweep; HRV gates suspend during travel windows |

---

## 11. 8-week progress photo signals + standardization protocol

**Standardization protocol (set up BEFORE next sweep):**
- Camera: same phone, same room, fixed distance (mark floor tape — tripod or shelf at chest height)
- Lens: rear camera, no zoom, no portrait mode
- Lighting: same time of day, same overhead + side light (or natural window)
- Pose: identical foot placement, identical arm position. 4 poses: front relaxed, front double-bi, side relaxed, back relaxed
- Pump state: 4 poses pre-workout AND post-workout (relaxed = baseline)
- Water retention note: track high-sodium meal previous 24h, sleep <6h, hot day
- Paired tape measurements (same day): shoulder circ (over delts at widest), upper arm relaxed + flexed, waist at narrowest, high hip (at ASIS), full hip (at widest glute point)

**8-week signals to look for:**
- **Delts (front):** Cap/separation between anterior + lateral head — the "shoulder bulb"
- **Delts (side):** Lateral fiber bulge above the line of the arm
- **Glutes (side):** Upper-glute "shelf" above the cheek hang; underbutt crease should NOT deepen
- **Hip abductors (front):** Upper-outer hip widens *above* greater trochanter. Watch for unwanted TFL thickening lower/anterior
- **Core (front relaxed):** Linea alba shadow visible above navel even unflexed
- **Biceps (front double-bi):** Short-head width visible (arm wider through middle of upper arm)
- **Biceps (side relaxed):** Long-head peak visible without flexing
- **Chest (side):** Upper-chest fullness above breast tissue line — breast sits on a fuller shelf, not flat plane

---

## 12. Critic appendix — what each iteration caught

### Iterations 1–3 (multi-persona panel on Draft v1 → v3) — see v5 file in version control

Top fixes from those iterations baked into all subsequent versions:
- Canonical 18-slug discipline
- Rotator cuff cap protection (drop banded ER prehab + D2 lateral intensity)
- 45° back ext over SL RDL for true glute primary
- Cable lateral lengthened-bias (ipsilateral D2, lying-incline D5)
- Cable rope hammer for brachialis width
- Chest-supported row for lats + rhomboids + mid_traps
- W1 65 / W2 80 / W3 95 / W4 65 deload ramp
- Pre/post nutrition cues
- Form cues embedded in set_targets.note
- 8-week progress signals + standardization protocol
- Pre-migration vision body_md template spelled out

### Codex pass 1 (on v4, Sun schedule) — see v5 file

Caught: HRV gate too narrow (added 3-gate); D5 skip destroying BUILD targets; biceps freq collapse on skip; D4 ordering wrong (row before curls); cable flye orientation (low-to-high); D5 BTB → lying incline DB lateral; rotator cuff math honesty; Reverse Crunch rest-pause conflict; progress photo vibes (added standardization).

### User redirect (after v5 proposal delivered)

Lou flagged: Sat–Sun stack is worse than Mon–Fri (you can't reject one and accept the other). 3× glute frequency staggered intensity is better than 2× concentrated. Per-muscle recovery research needed.

### Codex pass 2 (on v6, Mon-Fri schedule)

Caught:
- Wed "moderate" was actually heavy in disguise → trimmed back ext 3→2, BSS 3→2, RIR floor 2–3
- Biceps "3× freq" claim had implementation bug (no T finisher) → restored 1-set T finisher
- Core freq overstated (rectus actually 2× not 3-4×) → claim corrected
- "Without D5 within target" too generous → reclassified D5 as optional specialization, skip-week honestly under-target
- Eight Sleep caveat too weak (5 nights of post-travel rebound could clear gate) → strengthened to 7-of-last-10 + 21-28d trend check
- Rotator cuff arithmetic wrong (10 labeled secondary not 9; effective ~5)
- D3/D5 session times optimistic with 90s/side rest → honested to 60–65 min
- Summary-claims-don't-match-implementation pattern → all claims now match the exercise table

---

## 13. Known remaining gaps (accepted, not fixed)

- **Triceps 6.5 sets, 1× freq.** Below 8–10 target. Could bump D2 pushdown 2→3, accept session creep.
- **Lats 6 sets total, 1× freq.** Adding more crowds D4 or requires Day 6.
- **Hamstrings ~9 sets.** Eccentric recovery cost from M heavy + W back ext + Th sec is real; bumping risks accumulated damage.
- **Mid_traps ~4 prim.** Face pulls + chest-supported row carry it. Marginal.
- **Calves 2 sets.** Deprioritized — not a silhouette-spec muscle. Eats time without payoff.

**The "if you want to fix these" answer is a 6th day** — Wed afternoon glute pump session, or split D5 into 2 short Friday sessions. v6 doesn't design that — flagging as the option that exists.

---

## 14. What to do with this file

- **Re-read the 3 gates** at the top before ANY MCP migration call
- **Lou's call:** review the proposal, push back on any structural choice (especially the D5 optional-specialization framing in §6 or the codex-driven D3 trim in §7), then say "apply" when ready
- **Don't apply on tomorrow's scan alone** — gate 3 (recovery state + 7-of-last-10 valid nights) is independent of SMM
- **Skill iteration:** codex pass on v6 caught the summary-doesn't-match-implementation pattern recurring across iterations. Skill patch in progress to make Phase 1 pull the per-muscle recovery research up-front and use it as a structural constraint, not as a critic-2 afterthought
- **Eight Sleep gap is real:** if travel continues to fragment data, a ring (Oura/Whoop/RingConn) is worth considering as a comfortable backup data source
